From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

***[Raging Bull](/wiki/Raging_Bull "Raging Bull")*** is a 1980 film about boxer Jake LaMotta.

**Raging Bull** or **The Raging Bull** may also refer to:

## Nickname or ring name

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Raging_Bull_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Nickname or ring name")]

* [Jake LaMotta](/wiki/Jake_LaMotta "Jake LaMotta") (1922–2017), American former world champion boxer
* [Darren Corbett](/wiki/Darren_Corbett "Darren Corbett") (born 1972), boxer from Northern Ireland
* [Gorden Tallis](/wiki/Gorden_Tallis "Gorden Tallis") (born 1973), Australian rugby league player
* [Phil Vickery (rugby union)](/wiki/Phil_Vickery_(rugby_union) "Phil Vickery (rugby union)") (born 1976), English former rugby union player
* [Enrico Villanueva](/wiki/Enrico_Villanueva "Enrico Villanueva") (born 1980), Filipino basketball player
* ring name of [Manny Fernandez (wrestler)](/wiki/Manny_Fernandez_(wrestler) "Manny Fernandez (wrestler)") (born 1954), professional wrestler
* [Harshad Mehta](/wiki/Harshad_Mehta "Harshad Mehta") (1954–2001), Indian stockbroker and fraudster, nicknamed "The Big Bull" and "Raging Bull"

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Raging_Bull_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [HMM-261](/wiki/HMM-261 "HMM-261"), a United States Marine Corps helicopter squadron known as the Raging Bulls
* *[Raging Bull: My Story](/wiki/Raging_Bull:_My_Story "Raging Bull: My Story")*, LaMotta's 1970 memoir and the basis for the 1980 film
* [Raging Bull (roller coaster)](/wiki/Raging_Bull_(roller_coaster) "Raging Bull (roller coaster)"), a roller-coaster at Six Flags Great America in Gurnee, Illinois
* [Taurus Raging Bull](/wiki/Taurus_Raging_Bull "Taurus Raging Bull"), a revolver
* ["Raging Bull" (*Phil of the Future* episode)](/wiki/Raging_Bull_(Phil_of_the_Future_episode) "Raging Bull (Phil of the Future episode)")
* [RagingBull.com](/wiki/RagingBull.com "RagingBull.com"), a financial website
* "Raging Bull", a 2014 song by [ATB](/wiki/ATB_(DJ) "ATB (DJ)")

## See also

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Raging_Bull_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: See also")]

* *[Easy Riders, Raging Bulls](/wiki/Easy_Riders,_Raging_Bulls "Easy Riders, Raging Bulls")*, a 1998 book
* [Murattu Kaalai (disambiguation)](/wiki/Murattu_Kaalai_(disambiguation) "Murattu Kaalai (disambiguation)") (lit. 'Rogue Bull'), various Indian films
